name: GaugeFlow P5-D0.2 single-sample unconditional coordinate-flow overfit test v1
purpose: Test whether the unchanged unconditional coordinate field can memorize exactly the first frozen (source noise, t, target velocity) example from P5-D0.1.

parent_evidence.source_contract: Reconstruct the 64 D0.1 fixed examples with source_noise_seed=520101 and time_seed=520102, then select graph index 0.

training.loss: coordinate velocity MSE on the selected single state

decision_rule: If either criterion fails after exactly 5,000 updates, classify the result as an implementation-chain failure in the model forward, coordinate head, loss, or gradient path. Do not increase steps, capacity, or alter the optimizer. This audit never starts P5-D1, harmonic conditioning, oracle work, or any other experiment.
